Part.Source: Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &CreFilPgt = &Context.FilCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDUPLICATARECEBER', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'SEL_WWDuplicataCartao', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, '', &PadDtaMod) &TotCreVlrSdo.SetEmpty() &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Clear() &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod.Visible = False &Hoje.Visible = False Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECARNROAUT' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECARNROAUT' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECARNROAUT' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Pagar &CreSts = nullvalue(&CreSts) &CreFrpPgtoTip = nullvalue(&CreFrpPgtoTip) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Cartão Receber' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Vct.Cres.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Vct.Dec.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Número') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Cliente') &OrderedBy.AddItem(5, 'Lct') &OrderedBy.AddItem(6, 'Nro') &OrderedBy.AddItem(7, 'Emissão') &OrderedBy.AddItem(8, 'Vencimento') &OrderedBy.AddItem(9, 'Saldo') &OrderedBy.AddItem(10, 'Cartao') &OrderedBy.AddItem(11, 'Autorização') &OrderedBy.AddItem(12, 'EscritoCartao') &OrderedBy.AddItem(13, '%.Tx') &OrderedBy.AddItem(14, 'Pedido') &OrderedBy.AddItem(15, 'Vend.') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &Hoje = serverdate() &CreDupSel.Enabled = true &CreVlrPgt.Enabled = true if &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty() &CreDtaVct_To = &Hoje Endif EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Clear() PadraoUsuario.Call('L', 'WWDuplicatasCartao', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &Hoje = serverdate() &Status_AbertoFechado = 'A' If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() and &PadDtaMod = &Hoje &CrePagDta = ctod(Substr(&PadObs,1,10)) &var1 = Substr(&PadObs,11,1) &Status_AbertoFechado = &var1 Endif if &CrePagDta.IsEmpty() &CrePagDta = &Hoje Endif if &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty() &CreDtaVct_To = &Hoje // Data do Crédito EndIF Do 'loadSelecionados' EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load CreDtaVct.ForeColor = IIF(CreDtaVct < ServerDate(),RGB(255,0,0),RGB(0,0,0)) CrePedCod.Link = VerPedido.Link('wwDuplicatasCartao',EmpCod,FilCod,CrePedCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &ActionSelecione.TooltipText = "" &Editar = !'' &Recibo = !'' if CreNovCliRaz_Formula.Length() > 30 &CreNovCliRaz = substr(CreNovCliRaz_Formula, 1, 30) + '...' Else &CreNovCliRaz = CreNovCliRaz_Formula EndIf &Bandeira = RetornaNomeBandeira.Udp(EmpCod, CreCarBanCod) if CreCarCreDeb > 1 &Tipo= 'CRÉDITO' Else &Tipo= 'DÉBITO' Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ CreDupNro.Link = verDuplicata.Link('wwDuplicatasCartao', EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) &AuxCreCod = CreCod &CreDupSel = False &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total &CreVlrPgt = 0 &CreVlrTxa = 0 &auxCreVlrDup = 0 Do 'IsSelecionado' &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) if &CreDupSel = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) Endif EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &Recibo.Click GravaSessaoWpTipoImpressao.Call('RECIBO_CARTAO',EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod,0,0,'','','') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpTipoImpressao.PopUp() Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSaldo' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWSaldo.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImportarCsv' if 1 = 2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ ImportarCsv.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ else wpConciliacaoMaquininha.Call() endif EndEvent Event 'DoLancamentoMaquininha' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWLancamentoMaquininha.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' do 'MarcaDesmarca' do 'GravaSelecionadas' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoBaixar' do 'GravaFiltros' If not &CrePagDta.IsEmpty() // Do 'DuplicatasSelecionadas' If &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Count = 0 msg('Nenhum Registro selecionado!') Else &WebSession.Set('WWDuplicataCartao',&SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Toxml()) RecebimentoCartao.Call(false, &CrePagDta,'WWDuplicataCartao') EndIF Else msg('Data da baixa não pode ser vazia!') &CrePagDta = &Hoje &CrePagDta.SetFocus() EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoVincularCartao' wpVinculoCartao.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoAjuda' innewWindow.Target = 'https://ajuda.jaspi.com.br/index.aspx?bd0d1af7-dd89-48b1-add1-e0ad4d0c90d5' inNewWindow.Name = '_blank' innewWindow.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportWWDuplicatasCartao.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreCarNroAut1.Visible = False &CreDupNro1.Visible = False &CreCarCreDeb1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECARNROAUT' &CreCarNroAut1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECARCREDEB' &CreCarCreDeb1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreCarNroAut2.Visible = False &CreDupNro2.Visible = False &CreCarCreDeb2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECARNROAUT' &CreCarNroAut2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECARCREDEB' &CreCarCreDeb2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreCarNroAut3.Visible = False &CreDupNro3.Visible = False &CreCarCreDeb3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECARNROAUT' &CreCarNroAut3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECARCREDEB' &CreCarCreDeb3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECARNROAUT' &CreCarNroAut2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECARNROAUT' &CreCarNroAut3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECARBANCOD" &CreCarBanCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLICOD" &CreCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLIRAZ" &CreCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREVLRSDO" &CreVlrSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREFILPGT" &CreFilPgt.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRERECPAG" &CreRecPag.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRESTS" &CreSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREFRPPGTOTIP" &CreFrpPgtoTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREDTAVCT" &CreDtaVct.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &CreDtaVct_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECARNROAUT' &CreCarNroAut1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECARCREDEB' &CreCarCreDeb1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRECARBANCOD", "", not &CreCarBanCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreCarBanCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRECLICOD", "", not &CreCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRECLIRAZ", "", not &CreCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREVLRSDO", "", not &CreVlrSdo.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreVlrSdo.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREFILPGT", "", not &CreFilPgt.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreFilPgt.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRERECPAG", "", true, 0, &CreRecPag, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRESTS", "", not &CreSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREFRPPGTOTIP", "", not &CreFrpPgtoTip.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreFrpPgtoTip, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CREDTAVCT", "", not (&CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() AND &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &CreDtaVct.ToString().Trim(), &CreDtaVct_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECARNROAUT' AND not &CreCarNroAut1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCarNroAut1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECARCREDEB' AND not &CreCarCreDeb1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCarCreDeb1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECARNROAUT' AND not &CreCarNroAut2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCarNroAut2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECARCREDEB' AND not &CreCarCreDeb2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCarCreDeb2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECARNROAUT' AND not &CreCarNroAut3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCarNroAut3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' AND not &CreDupNro3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreDupNro3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECARCREDEB' AND not &CreCarCreDeb3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCarCreDeb3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Duplicatas" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &ActionSelecione.Click If CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA and CreVlrDup = CreVlrSdo if &CreDupSel = true &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselOption) &CreDupSel = false Else &ActionSelecione.FromImage(DDOMultiselSelOption) &CreDupSel = true Endif if CreCarTax <> 0 &CreVlrPgt = CreVlrSdo - (CreVlrSdo * (CreCarTax/100)) &CreVlrTxa = CreVlrSdo - &CreVlrPgt Else &CreVlrPgt = CreVlrSdo &CreVlrTxa = 0 Endif &auxCreVlrDup = &CreVlrPgt //- &CreVlrTxa If &CreDupSel = True &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem = new() &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.FilCod = FilCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliCod = CreCliCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliRaz = CreCliRaz &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliCodRaz = Trim(str(CreCliCod))+'-'+trim(CreCliRaz) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = CreVlrSdo &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrSdo = CreVlrSdo &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCbrCod = CreCbrCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePedCod = CrePedCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDupNro = CreDupNro &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDtaEms = CreDtaEms &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDtaVct = CreDtaVct &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagDta = CreDtaVct &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreEnvSpc = CreEnvSpc &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovCpl = 'CL:' + trim(str(CreCliCod)) + ' - ' + trim(CreCliRaz) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreSts = CreSts &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.Mensagem = &mensagem &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrTar = &CreVlrTxa &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePlanCod = CrePlanCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCarBanCod = CreCarBanCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCarCreDeb = CreCarCreDeb &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCarTax = CreCarTax &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Add(&SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem) else For &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtPagamentoDuplicata If &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &Index = &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.IndexOf(&SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem) &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Remove(&Index) Exit EndIF EndFor &CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total &CreVlrPgt = 0 &CreVlrTxa = 0 &auxCreVlrDup = 0 Endif Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! Esta Duplicata está Cancelada/Paga e não pode ser selecionada. Verifique! ') EndIf do 'GravaSelecionadas' do 'igualaolds' EndEvent Event 'Promtf4' 4 PromptCliente.Popup(&EmpCod, &CreCliCod) EndEvent Event &auxCreVlrDup.IsValid if &auxCreVlrDup <> &OldauxCreVlrDup &CreVlrTxa = 0 if &auxCreVlrDup <= CreVlrSdo &CreVlrTxa = CreVlrSdo - &auxCreVlrDup Endif &CreVlrPgt = &auxCreVlrDup + &CreVlrTxa For &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtpagamentoDuplicata If &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = &CreVlrPgt &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrTar = &CreVlrTxa Exit EndIf EndFor do 'GravaSelecionadas' do 'igualaOLds' Endif EndEvent Event &Status_AbertoFechado.IsValid do 'GravaFiltros' EndEvent Event limpar_campo.Click &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Clear() do 'GravaSelecionadas' Refresh EndEvent Event &Editar.Click &WebSession.Remove('wpEditDadosCArtao') wpEditaDadosCartao.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) Refresh EndEvent Sub 'GravaFiltros' &PadObs = trim(&CrePagDta.ToString()) &PadObs += &Status_AbertoFechado PadraoUsuario.Call('G',&Pgmname, &Context.PesCod,&Context.EmpCod,&PadObs,&PadDtaMod) EndSub Sub 'igualaOlds' &OldauxCreVlrDup = &auxCreVlrDup EndSub Sub 'loadSelecionados' padraoUsuario.Call('L', 'SEL_WWDuplicataCartao', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) &SdtpagamentoDuplicata.FromJson(&PadObs) do 'Totaliza' EndSub Sub 'IsSelecionado' For &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtpagamentoDuplicata If &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = &AuxCreCod &CreDupSel = true &CreVlrPgt = &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt &CreVlrTxa = &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrTar &CreTipBxa = &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreTipBxa &auxCreVlrDup = &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt - &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrTar exit EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'MarcaDesmarca' For Each using DSWWDuplicatasCartao(&CreCarBanCod, &CreCliCod, &CreCliRaz, &CreVlrSdo, &CreFilPgt, &CreRecPag, &CreSts, &CreFrpPgtoTip, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &CreCarNroAut1, &CreDupNro1,&CreCarCreDeb1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2, &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &CreCarNroAut2, &CreDupNro2,&CreCarCreDeb2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &CreCarNroAut3, &CreDupNro3,&CreCarCreDeb3, &CreDtaVct, &CreDtaVct_To) defined by CreDupNro If CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA and CreVlrDup = CreVlrSdo If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.DESCONTADA // CreSts = 'D' = Descontadas &TotDescontada += 1 &mensagem += 'DUPLICATAS DESCONTADAS/NEGOCIADAS, NÃO VÃO GERAR CRÉDITOS NO CAIXA!' + NewLine() Else &TotNaoDescontada += 1 Endif &IsAchou = false For &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtPagamentoDuplicata If &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod and &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.FilCod = FilCod &IsAchou = true EndIf EndFor If &IsAchou = false if CreCarTax <> 0 &CreVlrPgt = CreVlrSdo - (CreVlrSdo * (CreCarTax/100)) &CreVlrTxa = CreVlrSdo - &CreVlrPgt Else &CreVlrPgt = CreVlrSdo &CreVlrTxa = 0 Endif &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem = new() &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCod = CreCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.FilCod = FilCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliCod = CreCliCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliRaz = CreCliRaz &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCliCodRaz = Trim(str(CreCliCod))+'-'+trim(CreCliRaz) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt = CreVlrSdo &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrSdo = CreVlrSdo &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCbrCod = CreCbrCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePedCod = CrePedCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDupNro = CreDupNro &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDtaEms = CreDtaEms &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreDtaVct = CreDtaVct &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagDta = CreDtaVct &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreEnvSpc = CreEnvSpc &sdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.MovCpl = 'CL:' + trim(str(CreCliCod)) + ' - ' + trim(CreCliRaz) &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreSts = CreSts &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.Mensagem = &mensagem &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreTipBxa = TipoDuplicataBaixa.Total &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrTar = &CreVlrTxa &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePlanCod = CrePlanCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCarBanCod = CreCarBanCod &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCarCreDeb = CreCarCreDeb &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreCarTax = CreCarTax &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.Add(&SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem) EndIF EndIf EndFor EndSub Sub 'Totaliza' &numeric = &SdtpagamentoDuplicata.Count DuplicatasSelect.Caption = trim(str(&numeric)) + ' - Duplicatas Selec.' &TotNaoDescontada = 0 &TotDescontada = 0 &TotCreVlrSdo = 0 For &SdtpagamentoDuplicataItem in &SdtpagamentoDuplicata &TotCreVlrSdo += &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreVlrPgt - &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CrePagVlrTar If &SdtPagamentoDuplicataItem.CreSts = Status_Duplicata.DESCONTADA //DESCONTADA &TotDescontada += 1 Else &TotNaoDescontada += 1 EndIF EndFor EndSub Sub 'GravaSelecionadas' padraoUsuario.Call('G', 'SEL_WWDuplicataCartao', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &SdtPagamentoDuplicata.ToJson(), &PadDtaMod) do 'Totaliza' EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
